biological_replicate: 3 mice (1 wild-type, 1 Hdac1 knockout, 1 Hdac2 knockout)
generated enteroid cultures from isolated jejunal crypts of villin-Cre control, Hdac1 and Hdac2 knockout mice.
experimental_design: Different combinations of intestinal epithelial cell (IEC)-specific Hdac1 and/or Hdac2 deletion.
factor_value: Different combinations of intestinal epithelial cell (IEC)-specific Hdac1 and/or Hdac2 deletion.
